# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/`

## Public-Safe Checklist

- [ ] No proprietary algorithms or client data were introduced
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or connection strings were introduced
- [ ] The change preserves Shannon Entropy as the governing quality signal

## Commit Convention

- [ ] New commits follow Conventional Commits
